description_long: This is a sleek, black coupe car with a sporty and aerodynamic design, featuring a low-slung body and aggressive front fascia. The car has two doors, large alloy wheels, and a streamlined roofline that slopes smoothly towards the rear, giving it a fastback appearance. The front end is characterized by a prominent grille and sharp headlights, while the rear showcases dual exhausts and a subtle integrated spoiler. The side profile highlights its coupe proportions, with a long hood, short rear deck, and frameless windows. The interior, visible through the windows, appears to have red sport seats and a modern dashboard. Chrome accents on the mirrors and trim add a touch of sophistication to the overall look.
description: A black, sporty two-door coupe with a fastback roofline, large alloy wheels, and red interior seats. The car features a modern, aggressive design with chrome accents and dual exhausts.
description_view_0: Front view showing the aggressive grille, sharp headlights, and a glimpse of the red interior.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the coupe's long hood, two doors, large alloy wheels, and sloping roofline.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the dual exhausts, taillights, rear window, and subtle spoiler.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the coupe's proportions, wheels, and window configuration.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
